mapper.sql: id, report_type, report_date, scope_key, scope_kind, period_start, period_end, metrics_json, wordcloud_json, summary_markdown, ai_mode, model_name, status, generated_at, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_analytics_report ( report_type, report_date, scope_key, scope_kind, period_start, period_end, metrics_json, wordcloud_json, summary_markdown, ai_mode, model_name, status, generated_at, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{reportType}, #{reportDate}, #{scopeKey}, #{scopeKind}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, #{metricsJson}, #{wordcloudJson}, #{summaryMarkdown}, #{aiMode}, #{modelName}, #{status}, #{generatedAt}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE scope_kind = VALUES(scope_kind), period_start = VALUES(period_start), period_end = VALUES(period_end), metrics_json = VALUES(metrics_json), wordcloud_json = VALUES(wordcloud_json), summary_markdown = VALUES(summary_markdown), ai_mode = VALUES(ai_mode), model_name = VALUES(model_name), status = VALUES(status), generated_at = VALUES(generated_at), update_time = NOW()
